title: Historical Studies — eleven historical and operational case studies, including the manuscript Trilogy
public_claim: A historical-studies index for manuscript, diplomacy, war theory, international law, peacebuilding, and operational case pages.
distinctive_mechanism: It distinguishes long-form scholarship, international-affairs historical analysis, and operational simulations instead of presenting all history-facing work as one kind of object.
use_value: It makes the portfolio legible as applied historical reasoning: some pages are manuscripts, some are legal or diplomatic analyses, and some are scenario-based operational case studies.
